response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, deeply technical engineer with 19 years of software experience and proven ability to build complex platforms and infrastructure at scale. However, this role explicitly requires 'Recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' and his resume shows only two months of recent AI-agent infrastructure work with no evidence of shipped AI products, strategic AI platform expertise, or the director-level organizational influence expected at principal level. He could grow into this role but currently lacks the AI strategy depth and proven leadership scope the position demands.
strengths: 19 years of hands-on technical depth across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems; demonstrates genuine builder mentality with mastery of multiple languages and infrastructure patterns

Proven ability to design and build platforms at scale: GISCollective (open-source, ongoing), microservices handling millions of requests/second, direct mail automation serving millions of annual transactions
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with consistent emphasis on TDD, CI/CD, testing, and code quality—a solid foundation for technical leadership
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and unproven: only two months at re:cinq working on AI-agent infrastructure with no shipped AI products, ML platform expertise, or demonstrated strategic AI knowledge in the portfolio

Limited evidence of director-level impact: titles are Staff/Senior IC roles, not executive leadership; workshop talks and Refactoring Dojos show mentoring but not organizational-scale technical strategy or team leadership
No formal AI education: lacks Master's or PhD in AI-related field; no evidence of deep engagement with ML algorithms, model development, or cloud AI platform adoption strategy
